description: This file defines the ApiClient class which sets up Retrofit and OkHttp clients for network communication in a mock/demo environment. It handles token storage, request interceptors, and authentication refresh logic.

classes.name: ApiClient
classes.description: Handles network client setup with Retrofit and OkHttp, including interceptors, authentication, and mock backend configurations.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Factory method to instantiate an ApiClient with configured OkHttp and Retrofit instances, including interceptors and mock backend setup.

methods.name: loggingInterceptor
methods.description: Creates and configures an HttpLoggingInterceptor for logging HTTP request and response bodies.
